contract.prompt: Set navigation destination to airport via API, verify route in GUI
Start navigation to pre-set destination, verify active navigation
Stop active navigation, verify return to home screen
Play music from playlist via API, verify playback in GUI
Skip to next track, verify track change in GUI
Set volume to maximum via API, verify slider in GUI
Set driver temperature to 20°C, verify in GUI
Toggle AC off, verify status change in GUI
Turn on driver seat heating to high, verify in GUI
Dial a contact by name, verify call screen in GUI
End an active call, verify return to phone home
Add a new contact, verify in contacts list
Send a message via API, verify in conversation GUI
Read a conversation and mark as read, verify status
Delete a conversation, verify removal from list
Set screen brightness to maximum, verify in GUI
Toggle WiFi off, verify status in GUI
Toggle Bluetooth off, verify in GUI and phone status
Switch to sport drive mode, verify in GUI
Unlock doors via API, verify in GUI
